recurrent_dim_scaffolded_readout.idea: 在 family-specific disc operator 外，再叠一层跨 family recurrent-dim scaffold
recurrent_dim_scaffolded_readout.why: inventory 显示存在 universal recurrent dims，可作为更高层稳定读出骨架

dual_overlap_transport_operator.idea: 把 object->disc 与 object->memory 两条 overlap 联合建模，不再只盯 disc 窄通道
dual_overlap_transport_operator.why: inventory 显示 object-memory overlap 明显更宽，可作为辅助运输缓冲层

family_low_rank_readout_operator.idea: 将每个 family 的 low-rank 主轴直接嵌入 readout operator 结构中
family_low_rank_readout_operator.why: inventory 已确认 family patch 低秩，直接映入 operator-form 更合理

best_next_candidate.name: recurrent_dim_scaffolded_readout
best_next_candidate.reason: inventory 显示存在 universal recurrent dims，可作为更高层稳定读出骨架

verdict.core_answer: Inventory information now directly suggests operator-form changes rather than only tighter pruning.
